title: dichanthium oliganthum
intro: Dichanthium oliganthum, also known as little bluestem, is a perennial grass native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been attributed to its saponin and flavonoid content. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating respiratory issues. Dichanthium oliganthum can be prepared for medicinal use through infusion, decoction, or tincture, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
